ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "temp_plant1" REAL /* Temperature reading from Plant 1 sensor */,
  "temp_plant2" REAL /* Temperature reading from Plant 2 sensor */,
  "temp_plant4" REAL /* Temperature reading from Plant 4 sensor */,
  "air_temp_loc" REAL /* Air temperature reading from location sensor */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading from the environment */,
  "air_temp" REAL /* Air temperature reading */,
  "ambient_1" REAL /* Ambient condition reading (e.g., light level) */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture level */,
  "co2_level" REAL /* CO2 level */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farmer, researcher, admin) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the farm */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who manages the farm */,
  "farm_size" REAL /* Size of the farm in acres */,
  "crops_grown" TEXT /* Types of crops grown on the farm */,
  "gps_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the farm */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the farm */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the farm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farms_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farm_sensor_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sensor network */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farm */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor in the network */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the network was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the network was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farm_sensor_networks_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farm_sensor_networks_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farm the threshold applies to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor the threshold is for */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the condition */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the condition */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the threshold was created */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date the threshold was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farm where the alert was triggered */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Resolution status of the alert (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farm the analysis applies to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the analysis is based on */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was performed */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the analysis (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., calibration, repair) */,
  "maintenance_details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user (e.g., login, view data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farm_management_software_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farm the integration applies to */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm management software */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date the last sync occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farm_management_software_integration_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)
